editorialGuidelines.title: Audience First
editorialGuidelines.description: Every piece must target a specific role: CTO, Developer, or DevOps. No generic content.

editorialGuidelines.title: Code Examples Required
editorialGuidelines.description: All technical articles must include runnable code examples with TypeScript types.

editorialGuidelines.title: Real-World Context
editorialGuidelines.description: Link concepts to the actual codebase. Reference specific files, patterns, and decisions.

editorialGuidelines.title: Progressive Depth
editorialGuidelines.description: Start accessible (beginner), build to advanced. Tag difficulty level on every piece.
